notes: Per-key SETTING clauses for the biome/culture-aware re-roll batch. Towns get injected into TOWN_TEMPLATE, -city keys into CITY_TEMPLATE, regions into REGION_TEMPLATE (see .cache/gemini/gemini_batch_v3.py). Authored from docs/city-audit.md verdicts.

towns.bolgrad-town: an underground dwarven mining city: paint the SURFACE expression — a craggy mountain flank with a great fortified stone gate carved into the rock, smoking forge-chimneys and vent shafts, ore carts, spoil heaps, timber headframes over mine entrances, a small terraced surface camp; NO open-air farmland town, NO green fields The input has NO settlement markers; place the main settlement at the exact CENTER of the frame.
towns.coralesian-town: a small elven town high in cold conifer mountains: graceful timber-and-stone houses among tall pines on steep rocky slopes, rope bridges, terraced gardens, snow dusting the peaks; the lake shore is alpine and stony, not sandy
towns.davarn-town: a dwarven surface trade town in a mountain valley: stout square stone buildings with slate roofs, a fortified gatehouse, terraced slopes, rocky peaks rising on all sides, mine adits and smelter smoke in the hills
towns.kovlar-town: an underground dwarven city at the outskirts of ruined Saggorak: paint the SURFACE expression — a mountainside of bare rock with monumental carved gates, watch towers hewn from cliffs, cave mouths glowing with forge-light, spoil heaps and stone causeways; NO open-air farmland
towns.kykar-town: a dwarven city beneath a mountain: paint the SURFACE expression — the flank of Mount Gustus with a grand carved gate complex, forge smoke rising from vents in the rock, cliffside watchposts, switchback roads to cave entrances; NO open harbor, NO farmland
towns.larrad-town: a dwarven temple-cavern settlement: a holy mountain slope with a cluster of monumental cave-temple entrances carved with dwarven reliefs, pilgrim stairs, shrines, incense smoke from rock vents, rocky terrain throughout Fill the ENTIRE canvas edge-to-edge with painted terrain — no blank, white, or unpainted paper areas anywhere
towns.rolgrimmdur-town: one of the most fortified dwarven cities, built among ancient ruins: massive concentric stone ramparts and towers on a rocky mountainside, half-buried ruined walls of a lost city around it, forge smoke, siege engines on the battlements; mountainous terrain, no soft farmland
towns.taggoret-town: the seat of an ancient dwarven kingdom: a proud stone city of heavy square masonry, monumental statues of dwarven kings, great stairs, forge districts with smoke, set in a mountain valley with rocky ridges around it
towns.tar-kazmukh-town: a northern dwarven mountain town famous for its arcane library: stout stone buildings around a grand domed library citadel, cold high-valley terrain with rocky slopes and conifers
towns.twingate-town: a semi-permanent TENT city on a gulf shore: hundreds of colorful trade tents, pavilions and yurts in organized rows, wagon parks, corrals, two great gate-arches, only a handful of permanent stone buildings; busy caravan roads
towns.al-varish-town: a MASSIVE Keleshite trading city on arid plains: dense mudbrick and sandstone quarters with domes and slender towers, grand bazaars, caravanserai with camel trains, city walls; dry dun-colored steppe and dust roads all around, only irrigated green strips along water
towns.algidheart-town: an Irriseni provincial capital in ETERNAL WINTER: steep-roofed houses buried under heavy snow, smoking chimneys, ice-rimed walls, the river frozen solid as an ice road, snowfields and rimed leafless trees everywhere, pale low winter light
towns.alkenstar-city-town: a soot-stained industrial town in the Mana Wastes: stone and riveted-metal buildings, smokestacks, gun-mill workshops, aqueduct lines; surrounding land is blasted grey-brown wasteland with cracked earth and scrub — NO green farmland The input has NO settlement markers; place the main settlement at the exact CENTER of the frame.
towns.an-town: an Osirian workers' city: flat-roofed sandstone and mudbrick buildings, obelisks and small step-monuments, palm-lined irrigation canals along the river, golden desert sand beyond the narrow green river margin The input has NO settlement markers; place the main settlement at the exact CENTER of the frame.
towns.anthusis-town: the tropical capital of Vidrian on the Mwangi coast: Mwangi architecture of carved hardwood, whitewashed stone and thatch, a deepwater harbor with trade ships, palms and dense green jungle pressing to the town edge, banana and yam gardens
towns.apertan-town: an Arcadian market city of Xopatl: stepped stone pyramids, flat-roofed painted-plaster compounds around grand terraced market plazas, causeways, maize fields and agave terraces, lush green hills The input has NO settlement markers; place the main settlement at the exact CENTER of the frame.
towns.ardis-town: the faded former capital of gothic Ustalav: grand but decaying townhouses with steep slate roofs, empty boulevards, ivy-eaten manors, brooding chapel spires, autumn mist, muted grey-violet palette, low overcast light
towns.aspenthar-town: a Thuvian desert city-state: sandstone and whitewashed buildings with domes and shade colonnades, a bustling caravan quarter; golden desert dunes and rocky hardpan surround the city, green only in irrigated garden strips
towns.avilan-town: a MASSIVE Keleshite trading city on arid plains: dense mudbrick quarters, domes, minarets, huge caravanserai and market squares; dry dun steppe with caravan roads, green only along irrigation channels
towns.ayesh-town: a Qadiran coastal city on a dry peninsula: Keleshite domes and courtyard houses in sandstone, a busy dhow harbor; arid scrubland and dust-dry hills behind the town, sparse hardy trees, no lush green fields
towns.azurestone-town: a Galtan country town DOMINATED by a colossal azure-blue standing stone (menhir) about 100 feet tall at its heart, glowing faintly; temperate farmland, timber-framed houses, the menhir clearly the tallest thing on the map
towns.bailax-town: an Iblydan (ancient-Greek style) island capital: white marble colonnaded temples, terracotta-roofed whitewashed houses on terraced slopes, an agora, olive groves and cypress trees, a Mediterranean harbor with galleys
towns.bildt-town: an Ulfen (Norse) island city on a cold northern sea: timber longhouses with carved dragon gables and sod roofs, a palisade, longships and knarrs at the docks, rocky windswept coast, pines and snow patches, cold grey-blue light
towns.blisterwell-town: an orc-held open-pit quarry town: a giant terraced strip-mine pit with crude rope lifts and scaffolds, orc shanties of scrap timber and hide, spiked stockades, bone totems, slag heaps; dusty scarred badlands, nothing pretty
towns.bloodcove-town: a lawless Mwangi river-mouth port: stilted timber wharves and shanties among mangroves, dense green jungle wall behind, anchored smuggler ships, humid tropical light
towns.botosani-town: a Rahadoumi coastal city: whitewashed and sandstone flat-roofed buildings, shade arcades, a working harbor; arid hills and dry scrub behind the coast, green only in irrigated pockets
towns.braganza-town: a prosperous Molthuni plains city devoted to trade and Abadar: orderly stone architecture, a grand vaulted counting-house temple, tidy temperate farmland and hamlets around it
towns.breachill-town: a SMALL inland foothill town in eastern Isger: a few hundred modest timber-and-stone buildings around a town hall, rolling green foothills rising to wooded ridges, NO sea, NO harbor — replace any coastline with rolling land
towns.carrion-hill-town: a gothic Ustalav city climbing a strange steep MOUND that rises abruptly from mist-shrouded moorland: tiered crooked streets stacked up the hillside, steep slate roofs, brooding spires at the crown, grey fog, muted palette
towns.chesed-town: a HUGE Numerian river port, last stop on the River Road: a sprawling gritty city of timber and grey stone on a great river, big wharf districts, scattered glinting fragments of strange silver sky-metal; bleak windswept plains around it
towns.chillblight-town: an Irriseni city built by cold fey in ETERNAL WINTER: elegant alien architecture of blue-white ice and frost-rimed stone, the Frozen Road as a wide ICE causeway (not a river), deep snow everywhere, glacial blue light
towns.clear-waters-town: a city that FLOATS on a lake: interconnected platforms, pontoon streets and stilt buildings out on the open water, rope-and-plank causeways to shore, canoes and reed boats between quarters, Arcadian painted-plaster style
towns.danjing-town: a VAST Tian metropolis of Lingshen: dense tiered pagodas and curved-roof compounds along grand axial avenues, monumental walls with gate towers, terraced rice paddies outside, misty green hills; East-Asian architecture throughout
towns.delenah-town: a MASSIVE Keleshite trading city on arid plains: dense mudbrick quarters with domes and towers, caravanserai, bazaars; dry dun steppe around it, green only along irrigation
towns.demirah-town: a MASSIVE Keleshite trading city on arid plains: dense mudbrick quarters with domes and towers, caravanserai, bazaars; dry dun steppe around it, green only along irrigation
towns.drenchport-town: a storm-lashed Shackles pirate port: rain-darkened timber wharves, tarred shanties and taverns clinging to a battered shore, anchored pirate ships riding a rough grey-green sea, ragged palms bent by wind, heavy storm clouds and rain squalls
towns.dyinglight-town: a ruined Sarkoris city in a sulfurous fen: broken walls and collapsed roofs among steaming yellow-green hotspring pools, black marsh water, dead trees, a few campfires of squatters, ominous mist; no cheerful farmland
towns.ecanus-town: a Nexian fortress-city and war-machine hub: massive geometric bastioned walls, arcane spires and golem foundries glowing with eldritch light, drill yards; surrounding land is dry, scarred and strange — sparse alien vegetation, no lush woods
towns.ehur-town: a genie city in the heart of a sand desert: ornate domes, spiraling minarets and elemental palaces of marble and brass shimmering above an oasis, palm gardens at its heart, golden dunes stretching to every horizon
towns.el-shelad-town: a small Osirian city on the Scorpion Coast: flat-roofed sandstone buildings, a modest harbor; golden desert and rocky coastal cliffs dominate, with only thin irrigated green strips
towns.erages-town: a SMALL half-elven fishing village on a great lake: a few dozen graceful timber cottages and boathouses along the shore, fishing nets drying, small boats out on the water, gentle woods behind; village scale, not a city
towns.eto-town: a large Osirian caravan crossroads city: sandstone and mudbrick with obelisks and market plazas, camel caravans converging on gates; golden desert all around with rocky outcrops, green only at wells and canals
towns.free-station-town: a rough Mwangi river-confluence trade post: timber palisade, stilted docks at the meeting of two jungle rivers, dense green rainforest pressing in on all sides, humid haze
towns.gariz-s-city-town: an Arcadian city of Xopatl famous for music: stepped pyramids and painted-plaster compounds around grand amphitheater plazas, causeways, maize and agave fields, lush green hills
towns.gazbilah-town: a Qadiran city in mountain foothills: Keleshite sandstone buildings with domes climbing terraced slopes, the Zho Mountains rising as real rocky peaks behind the town, dry scrubby hills, aqueducts
towns.glimmerhold-town: a small independent DWARVEN hold: a fortified stone town built against a rocky hillside with a carved gate into the mountain, forge smoke, terraced masonry, watchtowers; rugged wooded hills of Nirmathas around it
towns.grand-pass-town: a small city guarding a high mountain pass between two nations: switchback roads climbing to a fortified pass gate between steep rocky peaks, terraced buildings, caravans; Arcadian stepped-stone architecture
towns.graydirge-town: a somber OSSUARY-CITY of undead Geb in dry foothills: grey bone-adorned architecture, charnel towers and mausoleum streets, skeleton work-gangs in grey lifeless fields, overcast gloom, desaturated palette; inland foothills, no cheerful harbor
towns.grayhaven-town: a fortified House Garess mining settlement in the Golushkin MOUNTAINS: stone keep and walled town in a high valley, rocky peaks around it, mine entrances and smelter smoke, conifer forest, northern cool light
towns.gujaraldi-town: the Arcadian capital of Xopatl: grand stepped pyramids, terraced palace compounds, painted plazas and causeways, botanical gardens, maize and agave terraces, lush green land
towns.gurat-town: a citadel-city clinging to a mountain SPIRE high in the Zho range: fortifications and tiered buildings wrapped around a soaring rock pinnacle, dizzying switchback stairs, cloud-wreathed peaks all around; NO beach, NO sea
towns.halgrim-town: an Ulfen (Norse) harbor city: timber longhouses with carved gables, sod roofs, a stone jarl's hall, longships in a cold grey fjord harbor, rocky coast, pines, snow patches, cold northern light
towns.haseong-town: the cosmopolitan Tian capital of Hwanggot: elegant curved-roof palaces and tiered pagodas, garden courtyards, flower markets, arched bridges over canals, rice paddies outside the walls; East-Asian architecture throughout
towns.hillcross-town: a vast nomad TENT city on subarctic steppe: thousands of hide yurts and mammoth-bone-framed tents in great rings, herds of mammoths and megafauna corralled outside, smoke from fires, cold tundra grassland, distant snow peaks; almost no permanent buildings
towns.hisuikarasu-town: the tengu capital of Kwanlai: Tian architecture with curved swooping roofs, tall narrow rookery towers with perch-balconies, prayer flags, lantern-lit streets, terraced paddies; East-Asian style throughout
towns.hoarwood-town: an Irriseni city carved from the stump of a colossal PETRIFIED TREE in a frozen forest: the giant grey tree-trunk city at center with dwellings carved into it, snowbound huts around its roots, rimed leafless forest, deep snow, eternal winter light
towns.hunthul-town: the hobgoblin capital of Oprak: severe regimented fortress-city of grey stone barracks-blocks, iron gates, drill yards and siege workshops in a stark mountain valley, war banners; disciplined military order everywhere
towns.husanah-town: a Qadiran city at the edge of the Meraz Desert: Keleshite domes and mudbrick courtyard blocks, caravanserai; golden dunes and dust-dry hardpan pressing close, green only in the oasis gardens
towns.iadara-city: the illusion-shrouded ELVEN capital of Kyonin: impossibly graceful spires and crystal-and-wood palaces grown among giant living trees, garden boulevards, shimmering veils of light, the forest flowing into the city; ethereal beauty, no human medieval architecture
towns.ihalar-town: an UNDERGROUND desert city: paint the SURFACE expression — a rocky desert escarpment with grand carved gate-mouths leading below, ventilation domes and light-wells dotting the sand, caravans gathered at shaded entrances, golden desert all around
towns.ipeq-town: an Osirian river city: flat-roofed sandstone buildings, obelisks, palm-lined irrigation channels along the Crook River, golden desert beyond the green river margin
towns.isarn-city: the INLAND revolutionary capital of Galt on the Sellen RIVER: grey-stone Galtan townhouses, guillotine squares, river bridges and mills; temperate farmland and woods all around — NO sea, NO coastline, replace any ocean with rolling green land
towns.izzet-town: a Qadiran city in the Meraz Desert: Keleshite mudbrick and sandstone with domes, shade streets, wells; golden dunes and dust plains all around, green only at the oasis
towns.jaha-town: a great CRUMBLING city in northern Mwangi jungle: ancient stone ziggurats and observatories half-swallowed by rainforest, vines over broken walls, a living town camped among the ruins, dense green canopy everywhere, tropical light
towns.janderhoff-town: a dwarven SKY CITADEL in the Mindspin Mountains: a colossal fortress-mountain of tiered stone bastions with forge smoke rising from its heights, carved gates, terraced approaches; rocky peaks all around, no open lakeside town
towns.jawafeeq-town: a Qadiran city on a dry peninsula: Keleshite domes and sandstone courtyard houses, dhow harbor; arid scrub hills and dry cliffs dominate, green only in irrigated pockets
towns.jol-town: the Ulfen capital of Southmoor: timber longhouses and a great mead hall, palisade, longships on a cold river, boggy moorland and pine forest, snow patches, cold northern light
towns.jolizpan-town: an Arcadian city of northwest Xopatl beneath a great volcano-like mountain: stepped stone pyramids and painted compounds, terraced fields climbing the mountain's green flanks, the peak looming over the town
towns.kaer-maga-city: the hexagonal fortress-city atop a sheer CLIFF at the edge of a high plateau: keep the hexagonal ring-wall exactly, but set it on the brink of a dramatic escarpment with a huge cliff face dropping away on one side, arid plateau behind, distant lowlands far below; no sea-level marsh
towns.kalios-town: an Iblydan (ancient-Greek) capital on a bay: white marble temples with colonnades, terracotta-roofed whitewashed houses on terraced slopes, harbor with galleys, olive groves, cypress, Mediterranean light
towns.kalsgard-city: the great Ulfen capital on a cold northern river: sprawling timber city of longhouses with carved dragon gables, sod roofs, rune stones, a fortified jarl's compound, longship wharves crowding the Rimeflow, pine forest, snow patches, steel-grey northern light
towns.kavapesta-town: a grim Ustalav pilgrimage city on a misty lake: austere gothic monasteries and steep slate roofs, funerary chapels, fog rolling off the water, bare autumn trees, muted grey palette
towns.kazuhn-city-town: a Taldan prefecture capital that is THREE-QUARTERS EMPTY: grand old imperial architecture with most quarters visibly abandoned — collapsed roofs, overgrown streets, walled-off derelict districts — and only the core around the forum still alive with activity
towns.kharif-town: a Qadiran city in mountain foothills: Keleshite sandstone town climbing terraced dry slopes, the Zho Mountains rising as real peaks behind, aqueducts, scrubby arid hills
towns.kraggodan-town: a dwarven SKY CITADEL city-state in the Mindspin Mountains: a monumental fortress-mountain of stacked stone bastions, great carved gates, forge smoke from its heights, terraced siegeworks; rocky peaks all around
towns.kragnaroth-town: a FIRE GIANT hold in volcanic mountains: a brutal fortress of black basalt blocks built at colossal scale, lava channels and glowing forge pits, ash-grey slopes, smoke plumes, jagged volcanic peaks; nothing human-scaled or cozy
towns.lamasara-town: a Thuvian desert city-state on the Junira river: sandstone and whitewashed buildings with domes and shade colonnades, palm-lined river gardens; golden desert beyond the irrigated green ribbon
towns.lasinavel-town: an elven river city of feasts in Kyonin: graceful pavilions and slender spires woven among great living trees along the river, garden terraces, lantern-lit banquet groves, the Fierani forest embracing the city
towns.lepidstadt-town: gothic Ustalav's university city: steep slate roofs and crooked timbered houses, the grand gothic university with spired halls, gaslit lanes, autumn mist, ravens, muted cool palette
towns.lopul-town: a large Qadiran caravan city in the southern desert: Keleshite mudbrick quarters, domes, huge caravanserai and camel yards; golden dunes and dust plains all around, green only at the wells
towns.maecho-town: a slow-paced Tian hot-spring city of Hwanggot: curved-roof bathhouses and pagodas around steaming turquoise spring pools, garden courtyards, stone lanterns, misty green hills; East-Asian architecture throughout
towns.maheto-town: a fortified Taldan foothill city of dwarven smiths: heavy stone walls and square towers, forge quarters with smoke, terraced streets rising into rocky foothills, the World's Edge peaks on the horizon
towns.manaket-town: a Rahadoumi port losing its war with the desert: sandstone and whitewashed buildings, a working harbor, and the famous gardens now DRIED UP — withered brown garden terraces, sand drifting into outer streets, encroaching dunes behind the city
towns.martel-town: an Alkenstar duchy town in the Mana Wastes: stone and metal-roofed workshops on the Ustradi river below bare mountains; surrounding land is blasted grey-brown waste with cracked earth and scrub — NO lush green fields
towns.mechitar-town: the necromantic capital of Geb: jet-black basalt architecture and Osirian-style STEP PYRAMIDS, bone-white boulevards, grey lifeless fields worked by shambling undead outside the walls, sickly green-grey palette, gloomy overcast light
towns.mirivenn-town: a settlement of AQUATIC elves half in a lake: graceful elven pavilions on stilts and floating platforms extending far out over the water, submerged glowing structures visible beneath the surface, canals instead of streets in the waterside quarters, boats and swimmers between them
towns.morozny-town: an Irriseni provincial capital in ETERNAL WINTER: snow-buried steep roofs, smoking chimneys, frozen river as an ice road, deep snowfields, rimed trees, pale low winter light
towns.mut-town: a small Taldan coastal city on a river-mouth peninsula: temperate farmland, orchards and vineyards, a modest harbor with fishing boats, tidy stone-and-timber buildings
towns.mzali-town: a sun-baked Mwangi city ruled by an undead god-king: golden mudbrick and carved stone compounds, step-temples hung with royal banners, dusty red earth streets, tropical scrub and baobab trees, harsh bright sunlight; no European architecture
towns.naamat-town: a LUXURIOUS TENT city in mountain foothills: hundreds of rich silk pavilions and grand tents with gilded poles arrayed along the river, carpets and canopied bazaars, horse and camel lines, the Zho Mountains rising behind; almost no permanent buildings
towns.nagaiyamatsu-town: a Tian tengu port city of Kwanlai: curved swooping tile roofs, narrow rookery towers with perch balconies, prayer flags, junks and sampans in the harbor, terraced paddies behind; East-Asian architecture throughout
towns.neruma-town: an inland Shackles city on a jungle river: stilted timber buildings and palisades on the riverbank, dense tropical rainforest and vine-hung uplands all around, humid haze, tropical light
towns.ng-n-hoa-town: the ORNATE, SOARING capital of Xa Hoi, one of Tian Xia's largest cities: a vast metropolis of gilded multi-tiered pagoda palaces, dragon-roofed temples, grand processional avenues and canals, lotus gardens, rice terraces beyond; Southeast-Asian imperial splendor at enormous scale
towns.nisroch-town: the shadowed port of Nidal: black gothic architecture with wrought-iron spires, narrow patrolled streets, a closely watched harbor under permanent gloom, dark grey stone, muted cold palette, oppressive overcast light
towns.oenopion-town: Nex's alchemical production center: strange fluted towers, bubbling vat-domes and glowing glass alembics among warehouses, chemical-stained canals; surrounding land dry, scarred and faintly luminous with alien scrub — no lush temperate woods
towns.ollo-town: a Shackles pirate town on a tropical island: weathered timber wharves, shanties and gun batteries under palms, turquoise reef water, anchored pirate ships, dense green island jungle behind
towns.omash-town: a Qadiran fortress-city of war schools: massive Keleshite fortifications with drum towers, drill yards and barracks quarters, banners; dry steppe borderland around it, dust roads, sparse hardy trees
towns.osibu-town: a hidden city in deep jungle with streets PAVED WITH GOLD: gleaming gold-paved avenues between carved stone and hardwood compounds, a ring of colossal ancient guardian statues encircling the city, dense emerald rainforest pressing in, tropical light The input has NO settlement markers; place the main settlement at the exact CENTER of the frame.
towns.otari-town: a SMALL working port town of about a thousand people: a couple hundred timber buildings around a modest harbor with fishing boats and a lumber mill, palisade, farmland patches cut from the forested hills; village-to-town scale, NOT a city
towns.outsea-town: a half-underwater town of aquatic and air-breathing citizens: CANALS for streets, stilt houses and submerged glowing dwellings, swamp and wet farmland around it, boats and swimmers everywhere, reed beds and waterways threading the whole settlement
towns.padiskar-town: a faded Vudrani island city, once the Shimmering Jewel: ornate carved towers and onion domes now weathered, ghats down to the water, palm and mango groves, dense tropical jungle at the town's edge, humid golden light
towns.pangolais-city: the Nidalese capital DEEP IN THE USKWOOD under a canopy that blots out the sun: elegant black-spired gothic city in permanent twilight beneath colossal dark trees, softly glittering lanterns, shadow-shrouded boulevards, deep gloom everywhere
towns.peijia-town: the LARGELY EMPTY planned capital of Bachuan on a bay: a vast Tian grid city of curved-roof compounds and wide axial avenues built for ten times its population — most quarters visibly vacant and weed-grown, only the harbor district alive; East-Asian architecture The input has NO settlement markers; place the main settlement at the exact CENTER of the frame.
towns.prada-hanam-town: a small Vudrani port DOMINATED by the Murmur Dome — an enormous alien multi-buildinged dome complex dwarfing the town beside it; onion-domed Vudrani buildings, ghats, palms and tropical greenery, turquoise sea
towns.promise-town: the dragon Mengkare's gleaming planned utopia: an immaculate white-and-gold city laid out in perfect geometric harmony, grand domed academies, manicured garden boulevards, marble quays; radiant, idealized, flawless
towns.quantium-town: the METROPOLIS capital of Nex: a vast strange city of arcane spires, hanging gardens cascading from towers, open-air hedge mazes, palaces of impossible geometry, two colossal statues at the harbor; dense and enormous, humming with magic
towns.quent-town: the second port of the Shackles on a tropical island bay: sheltered turquoise harbor crowded with pirate ships, timber wharves, taverns and warehouses under palms, green island jungle hills behind
towns.raliscrad-town: a Sarkoris city in the demon-scarred Riftshadow: half-ruined walls and rebuilt quarters amid blighted purple-grey wasteland, twisted rock formations, scorched earth and warped trees, an uneasy frontier-city feel; no cheerful orchards
towns.ridwan-town: Zon-Kuthon's holy city on a HOSTILE VOLCANIC PLAIN: black iron-and-basalt temple-fortress architecture, chains and spires, steaming fissures and lava-cracked black rock all around, ash haze, oppressive dark palette
towns.salav-town: a Qadiran city in mountain foothills at a river's headwaters: Keleshite sandstone town on terraced dry slopes, the Zho Mountains rising as real rocky peaks behind, mountain springs feeding the young river
towns.seidoyaji-town: a Tian tengu city of Kwanlai: curved swooping tile roofs, narrow rookery towers, prayer flags, lantern streets, terraced paddies; East-Asian architecture throughout
towns.senghor-town: a proud Garundi port city-state on a jungle coast: stone harbor moles and shipyards, Mwangi architecture of carved stone and hardwood, war galleys in the bay, dense green Kaava jungle pressing to the landward walls, tropical light
towns.skywatch-town: an ABANDONED mountain city around a colossal observatory: a great domed observatory and empty stone city high in frozen peaks, snow-choked streets, no smoke, no people, ice and rock all around, cold thin light
towns.starfall-city: the grim capital of Numeria beside the Silver Mount: a gritty river city of timber and grey stone under the shadow of a colossal half-buried SILVER STARSHIP mountain gleaming strangely, scattered sky-metal debris, bleak windswept plains, iron-grey light; NO sea, riverside only
towns.sukri-town: a Qadiran coastal city on a dry peninsula: Keleshite domes and sandstone courtyard houses, dhow harbor, arid scrub hills behind, green only in irrigated pockets
towns.surat-prakan-town: the great Tian capital of Tang Mai, seat of the Cinnamon Throne: a large Southeast-Asian city of tiered golden-spired temples, curved roofs, canal quarters, spice markets, river barges, lush tropical greenery and paddies
towns.taggun-hold-town: a Chelish mountain settlement in the Menador range: a fortified stone town in a high valley with rocky peaks on all sides, switchback roads, mine entrances, conifer forest
towns.tal-pas-town: an Arcadian coastal brewing city of Xopatl: stepped stone and painted-plaster compounds, great brewery courtyards with clay vats, fishing quarter on stilts, terraced agave and maize fields, green coastal hills
towns.tekeh-town: a Qadiran city in the Ketz DESERT: Keleshite mudbrick and sandstone, domes, shade streets; golden dunes and dust hardpan in every direction, green only at the oasis wells; NO wheat fields, NO hedgerows The input has NO settlement markers; place the main settlement at the exact CENTER of the frame.
towns.thap-samut-town: the northern port of Tian Tang Mai: Southeast-Asian architecture with tiered temple spires and curved roofs, canal wharves crowded with junks and barges, spice warehouses, tropical greenery and paddies
towns.thulsadus-town: a city of the naga empire of Nagajor in tropical jungle: sinuous carved stone architecture with serpent motifs, low wide ramps instead of stairs, temple ziggurats, dense rainforest canopy around terraced clearings, humid light
towns.todorokaze-town: the only city in Kwanlai's Kimu MOUNTAINS: a Tian tengu town of curved roofs and rookery towers built into a high mountain pass, switchback caravan roads, rocky peaks on all sides, prayer flags strung across the gorge
towns.totra-town: a great Osirian port: monumental sandstone architecture, obelisks and pharaonic statues at the harbor mouth, palm-lined canals; golden desert behind the irrigated green delta strip
towns.trollheim-town: an Ulfen frontier city facing Irrisen: timber longhouses and a stout stone-and-log fortress, palisade walls hung with troll skulls, longships on the cold river, pine forest, snow patches, hard grey northern light
towns.tulaupan-town: an Arcadian trade city of Xopatl: stepped stone pyramids, painted-plaster compounds, terraced market plazas, causeways, maize and agave fields, green hills
towns.ullerskad-town: an Ulfen trade hub of the Thanelands: timber longhouses with carved gables, a great thing-meet field, longships and river barges on the Rimeflow, pine woods, snow patches, cold northern light
towns.umnyango-town: Vidrian's largest settlement, a CRUMBLING pre-colonial Mwangi city: weathered carved-stone compounds and grand old walls patched with timber and thatch, vines reclaiming outer quarters, bustling markets in the restored core, tropical greenery, humid light
towns.urgir-city: the orc capital in the ruins of an ancient Thassilonian city, LANDLOCKED in dusty badlands: keep the city's ring layout but replace ALL sea with cracked dry badlands — colossal broken ancient walls and monuments repurposed with orc iron, spikes and war banners, smoke, scrap bazaars; NO water, NO harbor
towns.urglin-town: an orc city in the ash-blasted Cinderlands: crude scrap-and-bone architecture inside ramshackle walls, smoke columns, grey-red ash wastes and cinder cones in every direction, embers on the wind; no green fields
towns.usaro-town: the charau-ka city of the Gorilla King on a jungle lake: brutal ape-built city of piled stone, bone totems and skull racks among colossal trees, dense dark rainforest, mist over the Blood River's red-tinged water, menacing tropical gloom
towns.vellumis-town: Lastwall's surviving bastion city in the undead Gravelands: heavily fortified concentric walls bristling with knightly banners and siege engines, refugee quarters, the land OUTSIDE the walls grey, blighted and dead with skeletal trees and abandoned farms under an overcast sky
towns.wyvernsting-town: an orc settlement in a mountain spur ringed by a HIGH WOODEN STOCKADE: spiked log palisade with skull totems, crude longhouses and war tents inside, rocky Kodar crags around it, dusty ground, war banners The input has NO settlement markers; place the main settlement at the exact CENTER of the frame.
towns.xin-edasseril-town: the returned Thassilonian capital of envy: an ancient emerald-and-marble metropolis of colossal runelord architecture — monumental terraces, titanic statues, rune-carved walls — risen gleaming and strange beside the sea
towns.xin-shalast-town: the fabled city of greed HIGH in the Kodar Mountains: gilded spires and colossal gold-clad terraces climbing a giant mountain's flank above the clouds, monumental stairs, glacier ice and bare rock all around, thin cold light glinting off endless gold; NO sea-level farmland
towns.yan-tlom-l-town: Xopatl's great agricultural center: Arcadian stepped-stone and painted-plaster town surrounded by a spectacular patchwork of every kind of crop — maize, beans, squash, agave — with raised-bed chinampa fields and causeways
towns.yanti-i-ulde-town: the religious center of Xopatl: a grand Arcadian temple city — great stepped pyramids crowned with shrines, processional causeways, incense smoke, pilgrim camps, painted-plaster compounds, lush green land
towns.yin-sichasi-town: an UNDERGROUND city beneath the Gossamer Mountains: paint the SURFACE expression — misty forested mountain slopes with ornate Tian gate-pavilions over cave entrances, lantern-lit stairs descending into the rock, incense smoke from vents, no open-air town
towns.yled-town: Geb's garrison city of the undead legions: black basalt fortress architecture and Osirian step-pyramids, parade grounds drilled by skeletal legions, bone-adorned walls, grey lifeless fields, sickly overcast gloom
towns.zetang-town: the empyrean-ruled Tian port of Tianjing: graceful curved-roof temples in white and gold, celestial statuary and prayer-flag bridges, terraced gardens, junks in the harbor, serene radiant light; East-Asian architecture
towns.zilpatzi-town: an Arcadian logging city beside a dangerous forest: stepped-stone and timber compounds, great log flumes and lumber yards on the river, the dark wall of the Manzinago Forest looming close, guard towers watching the treeline
towns.ziplatna-town: the northernmost Arcadian trade city of Xopatl: stepped pyramids and painted-plaster compounds, caravan plazas and causeways, terraced maize and agave fields, green hills
towns.zurakan-town: the walled capital of Hukaris at the FOOT OF A MOUNTAIN: fortified city beneath the great rocky mass of Mount Jabel rising directly behind it, terraced lower slopes, dry Casmaron plains around

regions.crown-of-the-world: the polar crown of the world: the entire interior High Ice is a vast BLUE-WHITE POLAR ICE CAP with pressure ridges and glaciers — absolutely NO sand, NO dunes, NO oasis; margins are windswept tundra fading to taiga at the map's southern edges
regions.saga-lands: the eastern nation (Irrisen, between the Linnorm Kingdoms and the mountains) lies under ETERNAL WINTER: paint that whole area as deep snowfields with rimed forests and frozen rivers; the rest of the map keeps its current biomes; NO sand deserts anywhere on this map
regions.cheliax: temperate Mediterranean-style nation: green farmland, vineyards and hills, dark forests (Whisperwood, Barrowood), the Menador and Turanian ranges as rocky ridges, arid land ONLY in the far southern Katapesh-facing edge; NO sand dunes in the heartland
regions.ustalav: gothic Ustalav: damp temperate land of dark forests, misty moors, marshy lake country and low mountains in muted grey-greens and browns under overcast light — absolutely NO snowfield/ice smear in the center and NO sand desert anywhere
regions.irrisen: the witch-queens' land of ETERNAL WINTER: the ENTIRE nation buried in snow — white snowfields, frozen rivers and lakes (paint them as ice), rimed dark conifer forests, blue-grey glacial light; NO green fields, NO brown steppe
regions.katapesh: Katapesh itself: golden sand desert and arid scrub with a fertile coastal strip. The NORTHERN band (Osirion) is PALE SAND DESERT — hot dunes and hardpan, absolutely NOT ice or snow; nothing glacial anywhere on this map
regions.galt: fully temperate revolutionary Galt: rolling green farmland, vineyards, autumnal woods and the Sellen tributaries across the ENTIRE map including the east half — absolutely NO sand desert anywhere
regions.korvosa-environs: temperate Varisian coast: green coastal lowlands, marshy river mouths, conifer woods, with the Storval Plateau rising as GREY ASH-SCRUB uplands (the Cinderlands — grey-red cinder plains, not golden sand); absolutely NO Sahara-style dunes
regions.sandpoint-environs: the misty temperate Lost Coast: green coastal grassland and hedged farms, dense conifer and mixed woods, sea cliffs and coves, soft coastal fog; NO desert tones
regions.almas-environs: Andoran's green heartland: lush temperate farmland, hedgerows, riverside meadows and oak woods around the Andoshen river mouth; NO sand desert, NO badlands
regions.the-shackles: rain-soaked tropical pirate isles: every island lush green jungle with turquoise reefs; the mainland Terwa Uplands are JUNGLE-CLAD hills under storm clouds (dark wet green, not desert); the Eye of Abendego's storm dominates the northwest sea
regions.ravounel: temperate coastal Ravounel: green hills and pastures, the dark Ravounel Forest, sea cliffs on Nisroch Bay, cool maritime light; NO dry steppe, NO desert tones
regions.gravelands: the undead-blighted husk of Lastwall: GREY-BROWN DEAD LAND — withered fields, leafless skeletal forests, burned farmsteads, sickly marshes, ash-grey palette under heavy overcast; the Fangwood edges may stay darkly green but the heartland must read as blighted and dead
regions.druma: temperate mercantile Druma on Lake Encarthan: green farmland, the Palakar Forest, rocky Five Kings foothills east; the NORTH half is green temperate land and lake shore — absolutely NO snow or ice anywhere on this map
regions.razmiran: temperate Razmiran on Lake Encarthan's east shore: green forests (Forest of Veils, Exalted Wood), farmland and river valleys across the WHOLE map including the southeast — NO sand desert, NO snow
regions.whitethrone-region: Irrisen's frozen heartland around Whitethrone: EVERYTHING under eternal winter — deep snowfields, frozen rivers and a partly ICED-OVER bay, rimed dark conifer forests, blue-white glacial palette; NO green land, NO open blue water except cracked leads in the ice, NO sand
regions.caliphas-region: misty gothic Ustalav around Avalon Bay: dark damp forests, moors, vineyards in muted tones, fog on the water, grey overcast light; the EASTERN side is temperate wooded hills — absolutely NO sand desert
regions.nantambu-region: Mwangi jungle riverlands: dense green tropical rainforest and wet savanna along the river everywhere — the area currently sandy must be LUSH JUNGLE AND GREEN FLOODPLAIN; NO sand desert on this map
regions.egorian-region: the temperate Chelish heartland around Lake Sorrow: green farmland, vineyards, dark woods, low hills; the SOUTHERN half is green temperate land — absolutely NO sand desert
regions.daggermark-region: the green River Kingdoms: EVERY part of the land must be lush green — riverside meadows, broadleaf forests, wet lowlands and farmland along winding rivers; absolutely NO tan, dry, arid or desert terrain anywhere on this map
regions.pitax-region: River Kingdoms lakelands around Pitax: green riverlands, broadleaf woods, vineyards and wet meadows around the lake; NO desert dunes anywhere
regions.elidir-region: the temperate Isger valley: green farmland and pasture along the Conerica river, wooded foothills rising toward the Five Kings; NO dune fields
regions.vigil-region: the Gravelands around fallen Vigil: GREY undead-blighted temperate land — withered fields, dead skeletal woods, ruined farmsteads, ash-grey overcast palette; NO sand dunes, the devastation is necrotic, not arid
regions.tamran-region: forested Nirmathas on Lake Encarthan: the Fangwood's dense green (and partly autumnal) forest, wet lowlands and the lake shore across the WHOLE map including the south — NO desert
regions.thronestep-region: temperate Razmiran on Lake Encarthan: green farmland, the Exalted Wood, lake coast; the CENTER of the map is green temperate land — absolutely NO dune field
